title: Mudhan Mudhalil Paarthen Lyrics Aaha
stanzas:
mudhan mudhalil paarthen
kadhal vandhathe
enai marandhu enthan
nizhal pogudhe

enil indru naane illai
kadhal pole yedhum illai
enge endhan idhayam anbe
vandhu sernthathaa

nadhavan idhi ingethaan
naan enthan jeevanai
nerinil paarthen

nodikkoru tharam unnai
ninaikka vaithaai
adikkadi ennudal
silrkkavaithaai
mudhal paarvai nenjil
endrum uyir vazhume
uyir vazhume

eazhu swara ettaai aagadho
naan konda kadhalin
aazhathai paada

thegam engum kangal
thondraadho
nee ennai paarkaiyil
naanathai mooda

naan kanda maattram
ellaam nee thandhadhu
nee thandhadhu..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses themes of love and longing, reflecting on the feelings of missing someone special.

What is the context of this song in the movie Aaha?

In Aaha, this song highlights the emotional journey of the characters as they navigate their romantic feelings.

Who are the singers of Mudhan Mudhalil Paarthen?

The song features the talented voices of Hariharan and K.S. Chitra.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mudhan Mudhalil Paarthen was composed by Deva.

When was the song released?

The song was released on October 30, 1997.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mudhan Mudhalil Paarthen, the characters in Aaha find themselves enveloped in the complexities of love and longing. The song conveys a deep sense of nostalgia, as the lyrics reflect on memories and emotions tied to a past romance. With its soothing melody and heartfelt vocals, it evokes feelings of both joy and sadness. This timeless piece resonates with anyone who has ever loved deeply, making it a cherished classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mudhan Mudhalil Paarthen from Aaha is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Hariharan and K.S. Chitra, paired with Deva's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of romance. Dive into this timeless classic that evokes nostalgia and emotion with every note.
stanzaMeanings: I saw love for the first time, forgetting myself as my shadow fades away.
Today, I am not here; there is nothing like love. Where has my heart gone, my dear?
I see this river; here is where I have seen my life.
My dear, I have placed my trust in the days ahead.
When I look at you, I think of you; every glance makes my heart feel alive.
I will sing the beauty of love that I have embraced.
Wherever I look, I see you; you close my eyes with your gaze.
My heart is not beating; before this, I had nothing.
Everything I have seen is given by you, you have given it all.
